expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: defect feedback loop injects scenarios from prior defects into next feature QA plan
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly states it cannot demonstrate defect-feedback-loop scenario injection: result.md says it cannot show a mechanism that “inject[s] defect feedback loop scenarios (from prior defects) into the next feature QA plan,” and notes the support-only policy keeps adjacent issues as “context_only_no_defect_analysis,” i.e., “never defect-analysis triggers.” No injected scenarios/QA plan artifacts are provided.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase8
expectations.evidence: The output indicates phase8 is not present in the authoritative snapshot and therefore cannot be aligned: execution_notes.md notes “Primary phase under test is phase8, but snapshot defines only Phase 0–Phase 7,” and result.md reiterates “There is no Phase 8 described.”
